name: ClawTeams
tagline: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce
description: ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring specialists—or doing everything yourself—you get a coordinated AI team that thinks, plans, and executes like real employees. One goal. One team. Zero micromanagement. Tell your team lead what you want—"Increase Q4 revenue by 20%"—and they break it down, assign specialists, and run the plan. You get updates in Slack or Discord. High-stakes decisions wait for your approval. Everything else just happens.

name: Pazi
tagline: Vibe code business operations
description: Pazi is an AI team for that idea you keep coming back to — a book, a shop, an app, a skill you want to sell. Tell Pazi what you're trying to do and it builds a team of agents around your idea and starts making things happen: a website, first outreach, content, the next step. Every time you come back, something has moved. You stay in control; your team does the rest alongside you, one real step at a time. Like vibe coding but for business operations.

name: Goose Ads Remixer
tagline: Remix the ads already winning in your niche
description: The winning ads in your niche reveal what works: hooks, offers, copy structures, layouts. Goose learns those patterns and creates new ads for your brand with your real logo, product images, and messaging in minutes. First 10 ads free.

name: PgDog
tagline: Scale PostgreSQL without changing your app
description: PgDog is an open source connection pooler, load balancer, and sharding proxy for PostgreSQL. It's Postgres-compliant, fast, secure and built in the open by a community of database engineers.

name: Agentcard for companies
tagline: Give your agent a debit card
description: Give your AI agent a debit card. Issue single-use cards funded from your wallet with a fixed budget so your agents can buy things online.

name: Portero
tagline: Know exactly what's running on every port of your Mac
description: Portero is a free, open source Mac app that shows every open port and the process behind it. See what's running, kill processes on busy ports, fix 'address already in use' errors, and block ports with the built-in macOS firewall.

name: Claude Overlay
tagline: A floating Claude Code chat that sees your screen
description: Claude Overlay is a frameless, always-on-top chat window for Claude Code that floats over everything you do. Summon it with a hotkey, ask about whatever's on screen, and Claude captures and reads your monitors before answering. It runs the full Claude Code agent on your own subscription - no API key - so it can edit files and run commands, not just chat. Open source (MIT), Windows.

name: Branda
tagline: Turn any domain into on-brand ads, MIT Open Source
description: Branda turns any website URL into scroll-stopping, on-brand ads in seconds. Paste a link and Branda pulls the brand's real logo, colors, and campaign imagery via Context.dev's Brand API, reads the homepage so the copy sounds like the brand, and generates ready-to-ship creatives for LinkedIn and X. No login, no design skills, no assets to upload. Open-source and self-hostable.

name: Animos App
tagline: Showcase your designs in motion
description: Present your work with high-quality motion in under 1 minute. Animos is a browser-based animation tool built for creators. The workflow is simple: pick a template, drop in your assets, tweak, and export. With 30+ templates, 4K resolution, and MP4/WebM support, you can easily generate stunning, web-ready animations for your portfolio.

name: BugShot
tagline: Discover, fix, capture, and report bugs in one shot
description: Catch a bug and file a complete report from Chrome's side panel. Captures, console/network logs, and environment attach automatically. Or tweak the CSS live and send the before/after side by side. AI drafts it for you. Free, no account, straight to your tracker.

name: Sales Studio
tagline: Private studio for live demos on macOS
description: Sales Studio is a private studio for live demos on macOS. Your audience sees one clean, polished screen share in Zoom, Meet, or Teams. You see your script, notes, talking points, and every display you might switch to. No more window juggling.

name: Flyout
tagline: Rich-text notes that fly out from your Mac's screen edge
description: Nudge your screen edge — or press ⌥⌘N — and a full rich-text editor flies out over whatever you're doing. Checklists, reminders, folders, images, code blocks, iCloud sync. Native macOS, not Electron. Lifetime license, 7-day free trial. Every note is plain Markdown underneath. Your notes never touch our servers.

name: VocalVia
tagline: Turn documents and articles into editable multi-voice audio
description: VocalVia turns PDFs, Word files, Markdown, web articles, and pasted text into structured outlines, editable podcast scripts, and natural multi-voice audio. Choose speakers and voices, refine individual segments, then export the finished audio. It is built for saved reading, study notes, research papers, and long-form content you want to listen to away from a screen.

name: AutoShelf 2.0
tagline: Auto-organize files on your Mac now with MCP & CLI support
description: AutoShelf is a macOS app that watches your folders and auto-organizes files. Set a rule once and never think about it again. Free to try, unlock unlimited for $19.99.

name: Altersend
tagline: File transfer with no cloud storage, no account, no limits
description: AlterSend sends files directly between devices - P2P, E2EE, no cloud storage, no account, no size limits. Open source and cross-platform: mobile + desktop. Share a code or scan a QR, and files stream straight across.

name: Breva
tagline: Turn your Mac trackpad into a gentle breathing guide
description: Breva turns your Mac trackpad into a gentle breathing guide. Choose a breathing pattern, set a session length, and follow a soft expanding orb with optional audio and haptic cues. It works locally, needs no account, and helps you take short reset breaks without reaching for your phone.

name: Trump Accounts
tagline: Build long-term financial security for your child
description: Trump Accounts help eligible American children begin building long-term financial growth from an early age. Eligible children born between 2025–2028 can qualify for an initial $1,000 U.S. Treasury contribution beginning July 4, 2026. The account features a pilot program contribution of $1,000 for children born between Jan. 1, 2025, and Dec. 31, 2028, and who are U.S. citizens with a valid Social Security number.

name: ClipFlow
tagline: Small video jobs, without a timeline
description: ClipFlow handles the small video jobs that do not need a timeline. Trim, join, compress, reverse, filter, caption, mute, blur, or convert a clip, then continue with the result. Version 1.9 adds partial reverse and 13 filter styles. Most processing runs on device.

name: Mojave Paint
tagline: Direct manipulation of static images on the Mac platform
description: Bitmap images are still, even in 2026, a hugely important medium of communication. Which is why I made Mojave Paint – a Mac-based image editor that lets you really own the production of these bitmap images. They've been making image editors since the original Mac and the Amiga and I'm sure even long before that. But somehow the choices in the modern era fall short. So I have a new option, presented by an upstart software shop in Seattle. If you're looking for AI features, look elsewhere.

name: Sourclip
tagline: Turn NotebookLM into a complete research workflow
description: Sourclip is the research workflow for NotebookLM. It helps you discover high-quality research sources, capture webpages, PDFs, YouTube videos, Reddit posts, and AI chats into NotebookLM with one click. Organize everything with folders, reuse prompts across projects, sync your workspace across devices, and export your research as Markdown, HTML, or PDF. You can also turn NotebookLM Audio Overviews into a private podcast feed for Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Pocket Casts, and other podcast apps.

name: ClawTeams
tagline: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce
description: ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring specialists—or doing everything yourself—you get a coordinated AI team that thinks, plans, and executes like real employees. One goal. One team. Zero micromanagement.
